articles.title: Gold eases as markets assess Middle East escalation, Fed hike bets
articles.description: Gold prices edged lower on Monday as investors assessed an escalation in the Middle East war that pushed oil prices higher, while another U.S. Federal Reserve policymaker signalled that interest rate hikes may be needed to curb price pressures.

articles.title: Oil prices remain biggest risk for Indian markets, says Kotak Mahindra AMC's Nilesh Shah
articles.description: Nilesh Shah, Managing Director of Kotak Mahindra AMC, continues to recommend an equal-weight allocation to equities, while favouring a marginal overweight position for aggressive investors. Shah also highlighted opportunities in power and electrification, advised caution on AI funding trends, and said governance should remain the primary consideration when investing in small-cap companies.

articles.title: European Shares Dip Amid U.S.-Iran Tensions and Soaring Oil Prices
articles.description: European shares declined on Monday due to rising U.S.-Iran tensions, which pushed oil prices above $90 a barrel. Energy stocks surged, while travel and leisure fell. Ryanair dropped 4.6% due to profit declines. Tech stocks rose slightly as markets anticipated earnings from major U.S. tech companies and the ECB meeting.

articles.title: Indian Rupee & Bond Markets Brace for Volatile Week as Rising Crude Oil Prices, Geopolitical Frictions Strain Local Assets
articles.description: The Indian rupee's outlook remains volatile this week, driven by rising crude oil prices near $95 per barrel and escalating US-Iran conflict blocking the Strait of Hormuz.
